/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -Wno-comment -O3 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/demo_multicontext.dir/demo_multicontext.cc.o -o demo_multicontext -F/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libGLEW.2.3.1.dylib -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libpng.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd
